Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
